top3.sql:
SELECT full_name 
FROM superhero 
WHERE alignment_id = (SELECT id FROM alignment WHERE alignment = 'good') 
  AND publisher_id IN (SELECT id FROM publisher WHERE publisher_name IN ('Marvel', 'DC'))
LIMIT 5;

SELECT full_name FROM superhero WHERE alignment_id = (SELECT id FROM alignment WHERE alignment = 'good') AND full_name LIKE '%Demi-God%' OR full_name LIKE '%Demigod%' OR full_name LIKE '%Half-God%' OR full_name LIKE '%Halfgod%' LIMIT 5;

SELECT full_name 
FROM superhero 
WHERE alignment_id = (SELECT id FROM alignment WHERE alignment = 'good') 
  AND publisher_id IN (SELECT id FROM publisher WHERE publisher_name IN ('Marvel', 'DC'))
LIMIT 5;

SELECT full_name FROM superhero WHERE alignment_id = (SELECT id FROM alignment WHERE alignment = 'good') AND full_name LIKE '%Demi-God%' OR full_name LIKE '%Demigod%' OR full_name LIKE '%Half-God%' OR full_name LIKE '%Halfgod%' LIMIT 5;

SELECT full_name 
FROM superhero 
WHERE race_id = (SELECT id FROM race WHERE race = 'Demi-God') 
  AND full_name IS NOT NULL 
LIMIT 5;

LIMIT 5;

LIMIT 5;

final.sql:
SELECT full_name 
FROM superhero 
WHERE alignment_id = (SELECT id FROM alignment WHERE alignment = 'good') 
  AND publisher_id IN (SELECT id FROM publisher WHERE publisher_name IN ('Marvel', 'DC'))
LIMIT 5;
